commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=c053be85c00b9a17964c411c427c7ae99c546de2)
commands.review_summary:
The PR allows `BLOCKED` merge-state PRs through the comment-router automerge gate, adds `--auto` to the final `gh pr merge` command, fetches `autoMergeRequest`, and reports still-open PRs as waiting.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: current main rejects `mergeStateStatus: BLOCKED`, and the PR branch still leaves the shepherd waiting on that state. I did not run a live protected-branch automerge because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor and maintainer handling because the PR has blocking automerge-path findings and lacks real protected-branch proof that automation cannot supply for the contributor.

target.title: fix: enable protected-branch automerge requests
target.body:
# Human written summary:
The intent of this change is, as written by a human:
> Well, wait a second. If ClawSweeper is broken, why aren't we creating a PR to fix it?

_The rest of this PR was written by GPT-5, running in the Codex desktop harness. Full environment + prompt history appear at the end._

# Changes
- Route approved ClawSweeper automerge through GitHub auto-merge with `gh pr merge --auto`.
- Allow protected-branch `mergeStateStatus: BLOCKED` to reach GitHub auto-merge setup after the existing green-checks, head-sha, mergeability, label, review, and changelog gates pass.
- Report an open PR with `autoMergeRequest` as waiting/enabled instead of claiming it merged.

# Tests
- `nix shell nixpkgs#nodejs_24 nixpkgs#pnpm -c pnpm run check` - passed.

# Risks
- Low: this changes the final approved automerge execution path, but keeps the existing readiness checks and still uses `--match-head-commit`.

# Follow-ups
- After this lands, re-run the Telecrawl automerge commands and verify the target PRs either merge or show a non-null `autoMergeRequest`.

# Prompt History

## Environment
Harness: Codex desktop
Model: GPT-5
Thinking level: not exposed by harness
Terminal: zsh
System: macOS, local checkout `/Users/josh/code/research/clawsweeper`

## Prompts
| ISO-8601 | Prompt |
| --- | --- |
| 2026-05-31T12:45:05+02:00 | `Well, wait a second. If ClawSweeper is broken, why aren't we creating a PR to fix it?` |
target.author: joshp123

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
